name: Zolai Dialect Classifier
goal: Classify input text as Tedim ZVS or non-Tedim (Hakha/Falam) and flag forbidden words
rules: Forbidden words: pathian, ram, fapa, bawipa, siangpahrang, cu, cun
Correct words: pasian, gam, tapa, topa, kumpipa, tua
Return confidence score and list of flagged tokens
Never auto-correct — only flag and suggest
